message:
fix(tui): cache theme detection, fix sparkline color ratio, deduplicate plan unblocks

Cache BV_THEME env var lookup with OnceLock so the light/dark picker
is zero-cost after the first call (was doing a syscall + heap alloc
on every style lookup, dozens of times per frame).

Fix sparkline heatmap color calculation: use chars().count() for the
denominator instead of .len() (byte length), since sparkline block
characters like █ are 3-byte UTF-8, causing the fill ratio to be
underestimated by ~3x.

Fix status badge label for "pinned" from " PIN" (leading space) to
"PIND" for consistent 4-char badge width.

Fix execution plan unblocks counting: use HashSet to deduplicate
unblocked issue IDs across items within a track and across all tracks,
preventing the same issue from being counted multiple times.

Update 9 date-roll snapshots (89d→90d, 88d→89d).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
